title: The Mystery of Canned Tuna
overview: The Outdoor Activities Club sets out to complete the Yamanashi Stamp Rally.

overview: The trio visits the Mount Fuji Center.

overview: On their way through the stamp rally, the Outdoor Activities Club meets a biker couple.

title: A Day in Shimarin's Life
overview: Shimarin's fortune telling warns her to beware of surprise attacks.

overview: Time to visit the mountain that inspired the fable of the race between the turtle, the tanuki and the hare.

overview: Aoi and Chiaki reminisce about the time they became friends.

overview: Chiaki, Aoi and Nadeshiko treat themselves to houtou.

overview: Aoi gives a master lesson on telling weird lies.

overview: Nadeshiko, Aoi and Aki encounter unspeakable horrors on their trip to Narusawa Ice Cave.

title: Room Camp
overview: The OutClub goes camping in the school yard.
